summary: Comprehensive testing of Medicine Tracker app completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly. Dashboard loads with proper default date (Feb 7, 2026), displays 21 medicines grouped by time periods, checkbox functionality works, progress stats update correctly, calendar date picker works, and Print/Export features are fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/intake POST creates intake records successfully
Backend API /api/stats/2026-02-07 returns correct daily statistics
Backend API /api/schedule/full returns 429 total schedule entries
Backend error handling works (400 for invalid date, 404 for non-existent medicine)
Dashboard loads at / with medicine list for Feb 7, 2026
Date picker allows changing dates and calendar popup works
Checkbox to mark medicine as taken/untaken works correctly
Medicines properly grouped by Morning/Afternoon/Evening times
Progress stats update when marking medicines (9.5% completion shown)
Print Schedule page at /print loads correctly with all features
Export CSV button generates download with proper filename
Medicine filter checkboxes work on print page (429 to 415 rows when filtered)
Future dates show 'No medicines scheduled' message correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (17/17 features working)
